sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الخَطُّ العَرَبِيُّ فَنًّا جَمِيلًا وَعَرِيقًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija se smatra veoma lijepom i drevnom umjetnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is considered a very beautiful and ancient art.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدَمُ الفَنَّانُونَ أَقْلَامًا خَشَبِيَّةً خَاصَّةً لِكِتَابَةِ الحُرُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici koriste posebne drvene olovke za pisanje slova.
sentences.translationEn: Artists use special wooden pens to write the letters.

sentences.arabic: نَرَى هَذَا الفَنَّ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ المَسَاجِدِ وَفِي الكُتُبِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovu umjetnost vidimo na zidovima džamija i u starim knjigama.
sentences.translationEn: We see this art on the walls of mosques and in old books.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الخَطُّ بِأَشْكَالِهِ المُنْتَظَمَةِ وَزَخَارِفِهِ الرَّائِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kaligrafiju odlikuju pravilni oblici i divni ukrasi.
sentences.translationEn: Calligraphy is characterized by its regular shapes and wonderful decorations.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الكَثِيرُ مِنَ النَّاسِ هَذَا الفَنَّ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى التُّرَاثِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi uče ovu umjetnost kako bi očuvali baštinu.
sentences.translationEn: Many people learn this art to preserve the heritage.
